notes: This plugin wraps openags/paper-search-mcp as an external dependency.
The MCP server can run from an installed Python package with python -m paper_search_mcp.server.
The Phase 1 discovery adapter invokes the upstream paper-search CLI, not the stdio MCP server.

As of the verified PyPI 0.1.3 package, paper-search-mcp does not publish console-script executables; use a PATH paper-search command from upstream main or configure EPI_PAPER_SEARCH_COMMAND to a wrapper script.
The adapter probes availability, fails closed when the command is unavailable, records upstream provenance, and normalizes runtime search responses before downstream stages consume them.
